title: Stage 04e — Peer-Review Preflight Gate
description: Mechanical pre-peer-review checks: git hygiene, test import paths, deferred red-team items. Written by 'devteam preflight' or auto-run at the start of 'devteam stage peer-review'.

git_hygiene_pass.description: True if no committed files are covered by .gitignore rules. False blocks peer-review dispatch.

import_path_pass.description: True if no Python conftest.py files have sys.path.insert(0, ".") which would cause try/except ImportError to silently fall back to a reference implementation.

deferred_items_count.description: Number of stage-04c noted_for_followup[] items. Non-zero emits a warning (not a blocker) so operators know to expect peer-review objections.

callerless_file_check_pass.description: True when no newly-added files were found to have zero callers in the project. Always true (this check emits warnings, not blockers) — false is reserved for future escalation.

adr_compliance_pass.description: True when no diff additions matched a @prohibit pattern from pipeline/adr/ files. False blocks peer-review dispatch.
